title: WATCH:  Good Samaritans help rescue kidnapped toddler
fullText: Good Samaritans help rescue kidnapped toddlerA convenience store security guard and a moving crew helped authorities in Arizona locate a missing 2-year-old thanks to an Amber Alert that had been issued for the girl.February 25, 2026
summary: A convenience store security guard and a moving crew helped authorities in Arizona locate a missing 2-year-old thanks to an Amber Alert that had been issued for the girl.
